title: Figurae Cells Above a Cantus
objective: Decorate the line above the given C-major cantus into florid half-beat figuration in which every dissonance sits inside a named directional cell (passing, neighbor, enclosure, escape).
prompt: Replace rests in V0 with parser-valid half-beat notes (duration 0.5) on every half-beat row from 0 through 5.5, and a single final note of duration 2 at beat 6. Integer-beat tones carry the harmony and must be consonant against the cantus. Every dissonant half-beat tone must be the interior of a named cell from the figurae reference: passing (+1 +1 or -1 -1), neighbor (-1 +1), enclosure (-2 +1), or escape (+1 -3), resolving where the cell promises. Use at least four cells with dissonant interiors, including at least one enclosure (its interior may be consonant). Keep V0 directionally shaped: one clear peak, no aimless fill.
success_criteria: Every row remains strict parser-valid MidGrid.
V1 cantus remains unchanged, including hold cells.
V0 attacks on every half-beat row through 5.5, one final note of duration 2 at beat 6.
Every dissonant half-beat tone is the interior of a named cell and resolves as the cell promises.
At least four dissonant-interior cells are used, plus at least one enclosure.
Corrected solution has no evaluator errors.

interval_rules.label: Integer-beat cell boundaries must be consonant
